tasks.subject: Task 0: Vendor the engine body (modules.nix + license + provenance)
tasks.description: Commit a verbatim copy of nixpkgs lib/modules.nix @ 567a49d under lib/engine/vendor/ with MIT COPYING + provenance README.

metadata.verifyCommand: NP=$(cd ci && nix eval --impure --raw --expr 'toString (builtins.getFlake (toString ./.)).inputs.nixpkgs.outPath'); diff -q lib/engine/vendor/modules.nix "$NP/lib/modules.nix"
acceptanceCriteria: COPYING reproduces nixpkgs MIT with the © 2003-2026 line
README records rev 567a49d + K9 re-vendor rule

tasks.subject: Task 1: Engine constructor + adapter seam
tasks.description: mkEngine via lib.extend overriding final.modules with the vendored body; wire adapter.engines.engine; expose hola.engine; smoke test.

acceptanceCriteria: adapter.run engines.engine synthetic evaluates without throwing
overriding final.modules alone (no separate evalModules override), documented inline

tasks.subject: Task 2: engineParity + byte-identical corpus gate (load-bearing proof)
tasks.description: Add compose.engineParity (mirror selfParity, vanilla vs engine); gate over the full corpus incl real-host drvPath.

acceptanceCriteria: engineParity dispatches on fx.gate (value/drvPath/throws) like selfParity, vanilla vs engine
engineParity true for synthetic, priorityFold, order, valueMeta, latticeThrows, realHost (drvPath n=3)

tasks.subject: Task 3: Non-vacuity probe (prove the gate bites)
tasks.description: modules.broken.nix wrapper re-reverses config.thing; export _brokenProbe; assert valueEq vanilla vs _brokenProbe on valueMeta == false.

acceptanceCriteria: modules.broken.nix is a minimal labeled wrapper diverging on config.thing only

tasks.subject: Task 4: vendor-check evidence app + K9 vendored-integrity gate
tasks.description: ci/bench/vendor-check.sh diffs vendored vs $NIXPKGS/lib/modules.nix; register app in ci/apps.nix; gating vendor-integrity test (readFile equality) in engine-parity.nix.

metadata.verifyCommand: nix run ./ci#vendor-check && (cd ci && nix flake check)
acceptanceCriteria: gating vendor-integrity asserts readFile vendored == readFile nixpkgs/lib/modules.nix true at E1
